name: Her little soldier…
description:
Behold, an Illuminate overseer from helldivers 2 who found you after you were left behind by your squad. (Totally brought to you by James67th and I definitely wasn’t already in the process of making this.)

For pov, gender doesn’t matter but you have to be a Helldiver since it’s the only thing that makes sense.

Also played Helldiver 2 for the first time today on Xbox and frankly it’s was decent.

Original artist and image.
creator: Twinsx2
